text.title: Embedding Caching Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from backend pick to deployed cache.

step.name: pick-backend
step.action: Pick backend matching latency + persistence needs. Multi-tenant → shared backend.

step.name: set-ttl
step.action: TTL = min(days_to_deprecation, 365). Bind hook to deprecation event for full flush.

step.name: instrument-metric
step.action: Emit `embedding_cache.hit` / `.miss` per call. Set alert at hit_rate < 5% over 30 days.

step.name: validate-and-deploy
step.action: Run validator; smoke-test (same text twice → second hits cache); deploy.
